findings.evidence: Generic owner resume still adds unsupported --sandbox, does not capture JSON events, final output, or thread ID, does not validate WORKER_RESULT, and overwrites initial runtime files.
findings.required_fix: Build separate exec and resume commands for Codex 0.142.4, retain per-turn runtime records, capture a private session reference, and validate each final result.
findings.acceptance_test: Mock initial and resume JSONL, assert the same session and two valid results are retained separately, and assert resume contains no --sandbox option.

findings.evidence: run_plan prints the full argv, exposing the Worker prompt and opaque resume reference in preview and execute output.
findings.required_fix: Print only a structured safety summary and redacted command shape; never print prompt or session reference.
findings.acceptance_test: Unique prompt and session markers must be absent from captured stdout and stderr.

findings.evidence: FINDINGS requires a non-empty list, and merge_findings emits an object that does not satisfy the FINDINGS contract.
findings.required_fix: Allow a clean empty review and make merged output a valid standard FINDINGS object while preserving per-finding reviewer_role.
findings.acceptance_test: Empty, single-source, and multi-source merged FINDINGS all validate.

findings.evidence: With parallel_worktrees false, two active Implementation Owners in different worktrees pass validation; task package creation and validation do not require assignments.
findings.required_fix: Require one global active writer for non-parallel work; require approval, isolated worktrees, and Integration Owner for parallel mode; validate assignments before launch.
findings.acceptance_test: No assignments, two Owners, unapproved parallel, duplicate worktrees, and missing Integration Owner fail; approved isolated parallel passes.

findings.evidence: The leak gate scans only git ls-files, so new untracked orchestration files are skipped; sanitize_summary removes only top-level sensitive keys.
findings.required_fix: Scan tracked and eligible untracked orchestration files while excluding ignored runtime; recursively sanitize nested keys and opaque session/thread values.
findings.acceptance_test: An untracked report and nested session marker are detected or removed, while ignored runtime is excluded.

findings.evidence: Any nonzero first turn without a result is classified MODEL_UNAVAILABLE, while resume no-result is evaluated as FAIL before the resume PARTIAL branch.
findings.required_fix: Return PARTIAL only for recognized model/provider unavailability; classify CLI/schema/argument errors as FAIL; order resume classification before result validation.
findings.acceptance_test: Synthetic unknown model, provider 5xx, CLI argument error, generic nonzero no-result, resume unavailable, and malformed resume result map to the intended states.

findings.evidence: Scope containment uses string startswith, allowing a sibling path with the fixture prefix to pass.
findings.required_fix: Use resolved Path parent containment and reject sibling-prefix, traversal, and symlink escape.
findings.acceptance_test: A valid fixture path passes; sibling-prefix, traversal, and symlink escape fail.

findings.evidence: Final Verifier PASS can validate with an unrelated task ID, no checks, and unresolved blockers.
findings.required_fix: Validate result against task ID and acceptance matrix; PASS requires complete passed evidence and no unresolved findings.
findings.acceptance_test: No-evidence or mismatched PASS fails; every acceptance item must have passed evidence for Final Verifier PASS.

findings.evidence: Static scripts, Makefile, and tests hardcode ORCH-001, so a generic template without this project task cannot run the gate.
findings.required_fix: Parameterize task directory and provide a generic sample package independent of ORCH-001; project Makefile may select ORCH-001 explicitly.
findings.acceptance_test: The generic layer passes offline checks in a temporary tree that has no ORCH-001 directory.
